titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the World Student Christian Federation Records - Addendum
World Student Christian Federation Records - Addendum
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Robert Mills

controlnote.p: This encoded findingaid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: finding aid prepared according to local divinity library descriptive practices.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 22:28

did.unittitle: World Student Christian Federation Records, Addendum
did.abstract: This addendum consists primarily of printed WSCF records gathered by the Yale Divinity Library up through 2015. It complements the WSCF archives of Record Group No. 46. The World Student Christian Federation was created in 1895 as an international student Christian movement which could encourage and coordinate the work of national student Christian movements.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: World Student Christian Federation Records - Addendum (RG 46C), Special Collections, Yale Divinity School Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The World's Student Christian Federation was created in 1895 to fulfill its founders' vision of an international student Christian movement which could encourage and coordinate the work of existing national student Christian movements, as well as stimulate the formation of unified student movements in countries where they did not exist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This addendum consists primarily of printed WSCF records gathered by the Yale Divinity Library up through 2015. It complements the WSCF archives of Record Group No. 46.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: The World Student Christian Federation records (RG 46) contain the records of the WSCF from its founding until approximately 1925, and consist mainly of materials from John R. Mott's personal collection. The remaining records of the WSCF, roughly 1925-present, are in RG 46F. These materials were held at the WSCF offices in Geneva until 2017.
Records from the WSCF Board of Trustees can be found in RG 46B.
Records from other regional WSCF offices can be found in RG 46A (North America), RG 46D (Africa) and RG 46E (Europe).

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Use of originals is restricted. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Divinity Special Collections staff for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes issues on "Struggle in III World", "La Nature de l'Imperialisme Aujourd'hui", "Chile", "Southern Africa"

did.unittitle: Booklets for Universal Day of Prayer for Students

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Consultation on Ecumenical Strategy in the Universities of Asia; Student World issue on China; Reflections on WSCF delegation's visit to China, Lectures from the Canada-Japan China Seminar

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: One issue of Fumec Testimonio magazine; Study document for Europe-Latin America and Caribbean Encounter
